basic_details.job_title: HCSL Project Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Hooghly Cochin Shipyard (HCSL) Recruitment 2026: Hooghly Cochin Shipyard has released the official notification for 3 Project Officer posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in West Bengal. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum age for all posts: 45 years. Age relaxation: 3 years for OBC (Non-Creamy Layer); as per GoI guidelines for Ex-servicemen (not exceeding 55 years).

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Mechanical Engineering with 60% of marks from a recognized University, Degree in Electronics/ Electronics & Communication / Electronics & Instrumentation Engineering with 60% marks from a recognized University
qualification.details: Project Officer (Mechanical) on contract basis: Degree in Mechanical Engineering with 60% of marks from a recognized University. Project Officer (Electronics) on contract basis: Degree in Electronics/ Electronics & Communication / Electronics & Instrumentation Engineering with 60% marks from a recognized University.

salary_details.details: For Project Officer posts, the salary will be Rs. 46,000/- to Rs. 54,000/- per month.

selection_process: Objective Type Offline Test Power Point Presentation Personal Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the HCSL Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of HCSL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.hooghly_cochin_shipyard_hcsl: Degree in Mechanical Engineering with 60% of marks from a recognized University, Degree in Electronics/ Electronics & Communication / Electronics & Instrumentation Engineering with 60% marks from a recognized University

content_sections.heading: HCSL Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the HCSL Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download HCSL Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Officer (Mechanical) on contract basis: Degree in Mechanical Engineering with 60% of marks from a recognized University. Project Officer (Electronics) on contract basis: Degree in Electronics/ Electronics & Communication / Electronics & Instrumentation Engineering with 60% marks from a recognized University.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum age for all posts: 45 years. Age relaxation: 3 years for OBC (Non-Creamy Layer); as per GoI guidelines for Ex-servicemen (not exceeding 55 years).

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: For Project Officer posts, the salary will be Rs. 46,000/- to Rs. 54,000/- per month.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Objective Type Offline Test Power Point Presentation Personal Interview

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the HCSL Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of HCSL to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the name of the organization recruiting?
faq.answer: Hooghly Cochin Shipyard (HCSL) is conducting the recruitment drive for various positions. It is a government organization based in West Bengal.

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The current recruitment is for the position of Project Officer. This role is offered on a contractual basis within the organization.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available in HCSL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the Project Officer posts. These include positions for both Mechanical and Electronics disciplines.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates interested in applying for the Project Officer positions must submit their applications through the online mode. No offline applications will be accepted.

faq.question: Q5. What are the important dates for applying?
faq.answer: The online application process commences on 10 July 2026, and the final date for submitting applications is 31 July 2026. Candidates should apply within this window.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for Project Officer posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for Project Officer posts is 45 years. Age relaxations are provided for OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) and Ex-servicemen as per government norms.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for Project Officer?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Project Officer role will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 46,000 to Rs. 54,000. This is a competitive salary for a contractual government position.

faq.question: Q8. What are the educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Applicants need a Degree in Mechanical Engineering or Electronics/Electronics & Communication/Electronics & Instrumentation Engineering with at least 60% marks from a recognized University.

faq.question: Q9. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC and PwBD candidates is Rs. 400. However, candidates belonging to the SC/ST categories are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for Project Officer posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for Project Officer includes an Objective Type Offline Test, followed by a Power Point Presentation, and finally a Personal Interview to assess candidates' suitability.
